summary: Added the manifest-driven reusable automation sync/check tool. Tools/repo-automation-sync.sh now supports --check, --sync, --target, --source, and --manifest, mirrors only manifest-approved reusable assets, preserves executable bits when requested, deletes stale files only inside manifest-owned delete_stale paths, and rejects Owlory-specific state unless explicitly approved. Added the initial reusable manifest and temp-directory tests proving sync, drift detection, stale handling, forbidden-source guardrails, executable mode, missing-target behavior, and idempotence.
validations_failed: Initial temp-target manifest validation used zsh variable name `status`, which is readonly in zsh; reran the same sync/check with neutral variable names and it passed.
missing_proof_levels: The real external repo-automation folder is not bootstrapped yet; repo-automation-external-repo-bootstrap owns that.
Automatic update hooks are not wired yet; repo-automation-auto-update-gate owns that.

contract_status_changes.before: The reusable automation boundary was documented, but no tracked manifest owned the distribution file list.
contract_status_changes.after: automation/reusable-manifest.json owns the initial reusable harness distribution list and template flags.

contract_status_changes.before: There was no executable tool for proving or updating the external repo-automation folder.
contract_status_changes.after: Tools/repo-automation-sync.sh supports --check and --sync against the manifest with deterministic drift output and idempotent sync behavior.

contract_status_changes.before: The exclusion policy was documented only.
contract_status_changes.after: The sync tool rejects forbidden Owlory-specific source prefixes unless a manifest entry explicitly sets allow_owlory_specific.

residual_risks: The external repo-automation folder remains unpopulated by this slice by design; bootstrap is queued next.
recommended_next_reason: The manifest and tested sync tool now exist, so the next adjacent step is bootstrapping /Users/raelldottin/Documents/Personal/repo-automation and proving check-mode passes against the real target.
